headline: Aliyah Boston, Caitlin Clark, and Sydney Taylor Make History in Sky vs Fever Thriller
story_summary: Aliyah Boston, Caitlin Clark, and Sydney Taylor Make History in Sky vs Fever Thriller Sydney Taylor scored a historic 30 points, but the Chicago Sky fell to Aliyah Boston, Caitlin Clark, and the Indiana Fever in overtime.
key_fact_1: Aliyah Boston, Caitlin Clark, and Sydney Taylor Make History in Sky vs Fever Thriller Sydney Taylor scored a historic 30 points, but the Chicago Sky fell to Aliyah Boston, Caitlin Clark, and the Indiana Fever in overtime.
key_fact_2: On the other end, Aliyah Boston anchored the Fever with a career-high 34 points and 12 rebounds.
key_fact_3: Fever guard Caitlin Clark finished with 32 points and 10 assists, shooting a perfect 15-of-15 from the free-throw line.
